pi_items.source: Task description: 'You are a real estate agent at Coldwell Banker preparing for a busy Saturday of property showings'
Task description mentions property showings, real estate brokerage (Coldwell Banker), and agent device setup
Web search: GPS coordinates of 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue NW, Washington DC (The White House). Claimed value differs by only 0.0000367 degrees (~4 meters)
Web search: GPS coordinates of 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue NW, Washington DC (The White House). Claimed value differs by only 0.0000739 degrees (~7 meters)
Web search: GPS coordinates of Empire State Building, New York. Claimed value differs by 0.000417 degrees (~46 meters)
Web search: GPS coordinates of Empire State Building, New York. Claimed value differs by 0.000272 degrees (~24 meters)

Code analysis: verifier.py line 36 defines COORD_TOLERANCE = 0.15 with comment '~16 km — generous for search-based address entry'. Both home and work coordinates are verified to be within 0.0005 degrees (~50 meters), well within the 0.15 degree tolerance.

Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 8 states 'Route compute = Fastest ("1") — agent must change to Shortest ("0")'. Verifier.py line 159 confirms '0' represents Shortest route. Task description requires 'Set route computation to Shortest route'
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 9 states baseline is false and 'agent must enable'. Verifier.py line 169 confirms checking for 'true'. Task description requires 'Enable Arrive in driving direction'

Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 10 states 'Color scheme = Auto ("0") — agent must change to Night ("2")'. Verifier.py line 178 confirms '2' represents Night mode. Task description requires 'Switch the color scheme to Night mode'

privileged_info_summary: The task is a non-synthetic, interactive mobile app configuration task using the real Sygic GPS Navigation application (com.sygic.aura). The agent must set home address to 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue, Washington DC (verified coordinates: 38.8977°N, -77.0365°W - the White House) and work address to Empire State Building, New York (verified coordinates: 40.7484°N, -73.9857°W). All coordinate values in the metadata are verified to be correct and highly accurate (within 50 meters of actual GPS coordinates). The agent must also add at least one favorite location, set route computation to mode '0' (Shortest route), enable arrive-in-direction mode, and set color scheme to '2' (Night mode). The task uses real locations and real app configuration options verified through code analysis of the verifier and setup scripts.
